funds_data.description: The fund is an actively managed exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) that seeks to invest in companies that the Adviser believes will benefit from global transformation in the systems supporting how energy and power are sourced, produced, and consumed. It is an actively managed exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) that seeks to invest in companies that the Adviser believes will benefit from global transformation in the systems supporting how energy and power are sourced, produced, and consumed. It is non-diversified.
